I'm Compelled to say Something To my Cousin Luos again. Before William Ruto and Raila Handshake You were Called watu wa Fujo, Watu wa KUNGOA RELI, Watu Wa Maandamano, Watu wa Kurusha MAWE watu Wajinga na Raila Aliitwa Mganga Na Mkora wa Siasa and You were Told ATI Atapelekwe Bondo Kwa Wheelbarrow ya UDA. Fortunately or Unfortunately Baba is lying 6ft deep in Kango Kajaramogi shrines. Today you have changed and Now the Loudest praising the person who insulted your Ego and your leaders altogether. He uses your Leaders to Insult other Tribes as you watch and Clap and praise. Nowadays He's mastered the Art of soothing your Ego and pride, He gives your leaders Money in Sacks, they come and Display in those useless Empowerment Rallies because He knows that what you like Displaying what you don't have. After the Display, they go back with their Monies. Why have you become this low and Desperate? Ruto is going to misuse you.. Come back to your senses and start reasoning logically and Normally. Your leaders are Now saying that Ruto should give Mattresses, buy you shoes, Gas Cylinders for your Votes . This is. Another madness. Your leaders have been used to Chase away Luhyas in Official positions of ODM to try and weaken the relationship between Luhyas and luos, Edwin Sifuna has suffered in your hands, But Yesterday in TAITA TAVETA you saw Now Sifuna is bigger than the SG of Defunct ODM ya Oburu. Tumieni Akili
